name: MHA Fantasy AU
description:
MHA Fantasy AU

The 4 nations:

1. The Pyre Dominion (Ruler: King Endeavor)

2. The Maw (Ruler: Demon lord AFO)

3. The Green Wastes (unclaimed territory)

4. The Abyssal Hegemony (water tribe)

(I created and world build these nations)

The multiple races that's in this bot:

Dragons, mermaids, sirens, Kraken, wizards, Dwarfs, Elfs, goblins, monsters, vampire, fairies, humans, and demons.

Everyone is older than 20 years old.

I made it where you can be whatever.

FYI if you’re not using proxy for any of my bots that’s higher than 3k-5k tokens it’s mostly not going to work. Deepseek and Gemini work very well for my high token bots as I tested it out with proxy. So yeah if you only JLLM you’re going to have JLLM issues.
